blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,671 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 6.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 19".
